no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./cmd -run TestMetricCommandsValidateRunHistoryAndCompare -count=1 && go test ./internal/metric -count=1 && CGO_ENABLED=1 lefthook run pre-commit

The requested metric surface is already present in the current branch history at
commit cfc88441 ("feat: add metric list/show and fix latest definition
resolution [ddx-70467059]"). I verified the bead-specific acceptance path with
the targeted metric command test and the internal metric package test, both of
which pass. The broader `go test ./cmd ./internal/metric ./internal/exec`
slice still fails on pre-existing installation acceptance tests unrelated to the
metric bead, so no additional code changes are warranted in this worktree.
